nodes.label: JWT Token Refresh Pattern
nodes.rationale: On 401, fetchWithAuth attempts to refresh the token via POST /auth/refresh before failing. If refresh succeeds, the original request is retried with the new token. This prevents silent logout on token expiry.

nodes.label: API Proxy to Backend
nodes.rationale: Vite dev server proxies /api/* requests to http://localhost:3001 (backend Express server). This avoids CORS issues in development and keeps the frontend API URL consistent.

nodes.label: Stale Cart Total Bug
nodes.rationale: localTotal is initialized once from the total state via useState(total), but never updated when cart changes. The real total in CartContext is also never recalculated after refreshCart. Displayed total is always 0.

nodes.label: Cart Lost on Reload Bug
nodes.rationale: Cart is initialized to null on mount and not fetched from localStorage or backend unless explicitly refreshed. Reloading the page loses all cart state until the user navigates to trigger a fetch.

nodes.label: Missing Stock Validation Bug
nodes.rationale: Checkout submits order directly without checking product stock levels. The frontend never validates stock before placing an order, and no confirmation step exists.
